summary: Frontend adds routing/layout, onboarding/preferences UI, swipe deck components, shortlist UI, and an Internet Identity auth button with an actor hook. Backend main.mo adds basic per-Principal profile/onboarding/shortlist scaffolding and access-control checks, but does not include the requested neighbourhood catalog or recommendation/matching logic. Generated static image assets are referenced but not shown as added under the required public path.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create a backend neighbourhood catalog for Nairobi, Kenya with a seeded curated set (>=10) including name, description, rent band (KES), commute notes, lifestyle tags, and an image reference; expose a method to fetch neighbourhoods with these fields.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows a frontend Nairobi catalog file, but the backend main.mo does not show any seeded neighbourhood dataset or a backend method to fetch it with the required fields.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement backend matching/recommendation logic ranking neighbourhoods by saved preferences (budget, commute, lifestyle overlap) and excluding already-swiped items; return scored ordered list for Discover.
missing_requirements.reason: backend/main.mo defines getRecommendations() but it returns an empty list and there is no visible scoring/ranking or exclusion based on swipes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Persist onboarding completion state and captured preferences so user can return later and edit; preferences affect subsequent recommendations; persist across reloads for signed-in Principal (or session if not signed in).
missing_requirements.reason: Backend savePreferences takes a Text and only sets onboarding state complete; no backend getPreferences/update preferences API is shown. Recommendation logic is also missing, so preference changes cannot affect backend recommendations based on the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Persist swipe decisions (like/dislike) per user and implement Shortlist listing liked neighbourhoods with ability to unlike; likes persist across reloads (Principal or session).
missing_requirements.reason: Backend shows shortlistNeighbourhood/removeFromShortlist but the file is truncated and no method to fetch liked IDs/shortlist is shown. Dislike persistence/exclusion is also not evidenced. Frontend references SwipeStorage but its implementation is not shown in the diff summary, so persistence can’t be verified from provided evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Discover swipe experience shows one card at a time with image/name/highlights and supports both gestures and Like/Nope buttons; minimal latency; empty state with CTA to adjust preferences or reset swipes.
missing_requirements.reason: Touch/mouse swipe handling and empty state are shown, but the SwipeDeck file is truncated before the explicit Like/Nope buttons section, and the data source that advances/excludes swiped items from the feed is not evidenced from the provided diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Integrate generated static images as frontend assets stored under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in UI (logo + placeholders).
missing_requirements.reason: UI references /assets/generated/*.png, but the diff summary does not show the required images being added under frontend/public/assets/generated (added files list shows only code files; omitted files are unspecified).

hallucinated_features.description: Access-control/authorization system with admin secret initialization and permission gating on backend methods.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement; requirements only specify single Motoko actor and per-Principal storage via Internet Identity, not an authorization framework with admin tokens/roles.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile creation flow (name field) and profile-related backend APIs beyond renter preference capture.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest focuses on renter preferences (budget/commute/tags), likes, and II sign-in state; a separate named user profile feature is not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Frontend-side static Nairobi neighbourhood catalog used as data source.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 explicitly requests the neighbourhood catalog be in the backend with a fetch method; adding a frontend catalog is extra/unrequested and potentially conflicts with the backend-source-of-truth intent.
